source_title: 04 Tunnel - Raya and the Last Dragon/01 Introduction - Tunnel Environment

evidences.content: 欢迎来到我们的下一篇章。 Welcome to our next chapter. 本章的主要内容是创建逼真的环境。 This entire chapter is going to be focused entirely on creating photorealistic environments. 在此之前，我们还在摸索如何使用虚幻中的各种工具、 Before we were still getting our feet wet with how we can use the different tools inside of Unreal, 但现在我们将开始研究逼真度，并创建电影照明和环境 but now we're going to start looking at photorealism and creating cinematic lighting and environments 引用了《拉亚与最后的龙》中的这张剧照。 by referencing this still from Raya and the Last Dragon. 我觉得这些墙壁和地面上有很多非常棒的高细节几何图形 I think there's a lot of really great high detail geometry on these walls and ground here 我们可以使用建模工具为其创建三维位移网格、 that we can use the modeling tools to create 3D displacement meshes for, 这是一种利用 Nanite（在虚幻引擎中使用任意多的多边形）的绝佳技术。 which is a great technique to leverage Nanite, the ability to use as many polygons as we want inside of Unreal Engine. 因此，我们要屏蔽场景，想办法通过 "电影渲染队列 "将其渲染出来 So we're going to block out the scene, figure out how to render this out through Movie Render Queue 这样我们就能在整个制作过程中进行进度渲染、 so we can make progress renders throughout the entire time we're making it, 然后制作灯光、体积雾，最后加入闪烁灯光和可循环动画的火炬效果。 and then work on lighting, volumetric fog, and lastly add in these torch effects with flickering lights and loopable animations. 我将逐步向您展示在虚幻中制作类似特效元素的最佳方法。 And I'll show you step by step the best way to make effects elements like this inside of Unreal. 因此，在我们继续之前，请确保您已启用建模工具插件。 So before we move on, make sure you have the Modeling Tools plugin enabled. 这对本课非常重要。 It's really important for this lesson. 在继续之前，我们需要下载 Echo。 And before we move on, we're going to want to download Echo. 这就是您可能在所有出色的虚幻 5 演示中看到的角色。 So this is the character you may have seen in all of the really great Unreal 5 demos. 如果您通过 Epic Games Launcher 进入虚幻市场，然后输入 Echo、 And if you go to the Unreal Marketplace through the Epic Games Launcher and you just type in Echo, 你会发现我们可以下载 Wind Walker Echo、 you'll see that we can actually download Wind Walker Echo, 它配有新郎、控制装置和物理互动装置。 which is complete with a groom, control rig, and physics interaction. 我们将使用这个示例来学习虚幻中的整个角色流水线。 And we're going to use this example to learn the entire character pipeline inside of Unreal. 因此，请继续下载这个项目，然后创建一个新项目。 So go ahead and download this project and you'll have to create a new project. 遗憾的是，只有旧版本的引擎支持这一功能。 Unfortunately, this is only supported in the old Engine versions. 因此，我已经把她导入到我们的项目文件中，如果你正在跟进的话。 So I've imported her into our project file if you're following along there. 否则，你可以下载以前的引擎版本并创建一个项目、 Otherwise, you can download a previous Engine version and create a project, 在那里打开文件，将 Echo 移植到最新的项目文件中即可。 open up the file there, and simply migrate Echo into your latest project file. 要开始创建我们的地图，我最喜欢做的一件事就是进入 "全部 "文件夹、 And to get started with creating our map, one thing that I really like to do is if you go to your All folder, 在 "内容 "文件夹的上一级，你会看到我们还有这个 "引擎 "文件夹。 which is one level above your Content folder, you'll see that we also have this Engine folder. 现在，如果你没有看到这个，你需要确保在内容浏览器设置中启用了 "显示引擎内容"。 Now, if you don't see this, you'll need to make sure that Show Engine Content is enabled here in your Content Browser settings. 不过，一旦你完成了这项操作，就可以双击 "引擎"，然后制作一个关卡过滤器、 But once you do that, you can double click on Engine and then make a level filter, 点击此处，然后选择 "级别 "即可进行设置。 which you can set up by clicking here and then selecting Level. 现在我们可以看到引擎默认的所有不同级别。 And now we can see all of the different levels that come with the Engine by default. 现在，我看到的是一天中这个时间段的默认地图。 Now, right now, I'm looking at this time of day default map. 如果我们真的喜欢这个，并想从这里开始、 And if we really like this and want to start from here, 我只需点击并拖动这个时间默认值到 Raya01 文件夹中的 UEVFX 级别即可。 I could just click and drag this time of day default into our UEVFX levels in Raya01 folder. 所以，让我把它复制到这里。现在，在 Raya01 文件夹中，我可以将其重命名为 ML 下划线 Raya01。 So let me copy that here. And now in the Raya01 folder, I can just rename this to ML underscore Raya01. 然后打开它。现在我们从这张地图开始。 And open that up. And now we're starting inside of this map. 另一种启动关卡的方法是删除场景中的所有内容、 The other way to start off a level, if I delete everything from inside the scene, 方法是打开 "窗口"，然后选择 "环境光混合器"。 would be by going to Window and then Environment Light Mixer. 然后这个环境光混合器，只要点击顶部的这些按钮就可以了、 And then this Environment Light Mixer, if you just click all these buttons at the top, 将创建天窗、氛围光、天空氛围、雾和体积云。 will create a skylight, atmosphere light, sky atmosphere, fog, and volumetric cloud. 这将为我们的场景创建一个天空太阳系统。 This will create a sun in sky system for our scene. 然后，我们可以从这里拖入一个立方体，重新设置位置、 And then from here, we can just drag in a cube, reset our location, 然后将比例尺重设为 20 x 20，并将垂直比例尺设为 0.5。 and then reset our scale to 20 by 20 and set our vertical scale to 0.5. 现在我们已经创建了一个非常简单的场景，它包含了我们开始所需的一切。 And now we've created a really simple scene, which has everything we need to get started.
evidences.speaker: instructor
